questions: What is the patient's systolic blood pressure (mmHg)?
What is the patient's diastolic blood pressure (mmHg)?
Does the patient have Coronary Artery Disease (CAD)? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have Left Ventricular Hypertrophy (LVH)? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have Cerebrovascular Accidents (CVA)? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have Transient Ischemic Attacks (TIA)? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have Congestive Cardiac Failure (CCF)? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have diabetes mellitus? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have Chronic Kidney Disease (CKD)? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have papilledema or other signs of vascular damage? (Yes/No)
What is the patient's race/ethnicity (e.g., Black or African American)?
What is the patient's age in years?
What is the patient's estimated Glomerular Filtration Rate (eGFR) in mL/min/1.73 m²?
